case_title: LORAE ANNE LAURITCH VS. MAHMOOD IRMAN ALAVI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAURITCH, LORAE ANNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALAVI, MAHMOOD IRMAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $537.86 FILED BY LAURITCH, LORAE ANNE AS TO DEFENDANT ALAVI, MAHMOOD IRMAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 195.00 - SERVED AUG-02-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALAVI, MAHMOOD IRMAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-11-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-11-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
